title: lil' buddies
description: Turns wolves into the default skins
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)

LIL' BUDDIES!!!!
This resource packs replaces all 9 wolf variants with small versions of the 9 default minecraft skins :)
Here's each variant and its corresponding minecraft skin:

Pale wolf - Sunny
Woods wolf - Steve
Ashen wolf - Makena
Black wolf - Zuri
Chestnut wolf - Noor
Rusty wolf - Efe
Spotted wolf - Alex
Striped wolf - Kai
Snowy wolf - Ari

Tamed buddies will have a little bracelet so you can identify which one is tamed and which one isn't.
Bracelets can be dyed just like normal collars!
All buddies will have the Herobrine eyes when they're angry.

EXTRAS
When naming a Pale wolf (here it is the Sunny skin) the following names with a nametag, they will change skin:

Supermugget
Super_Jose
Fommxo
Fomxxo in suit
Portal guy
Herborine
Jack Black
uremosdan

Additional credit to the creators of these skins:
"Supermugget" by Mugget

"Super_Jose" by Super_Jose

"Fommxo and Fommxo in suit" by Super_Jose" (skin made for a friend)

"Portal guy" by Super_Jose (also made for a friend)

"Herobrine" by Mojang but eyes recolored by Super_Jose

"Jack Black" by RuotaCheGira and published by WanMine

"urmosdan" by urmosdan


Thanks for these people for letting me use their skin :D
This was way too much work for me and i'm sure i won't port this to bedrock so don't even bother asking hehe... sorry :(
